name: batch_update_feishu_block_text
description: Updates text content and styling of multiple document blocks. For Feishu wiki links (https://xxx.feishu.cn/wiki/xxx), use get_feishu_document_info first to obtain the documentId, then use that ID for editing operations.

documentId.description:
Document ID or URL (required). Supports the following formats:
1. Standard document URL: https://xxx.feishu.cn/docs/xxx or https://xxx.feishu.cn/docx/xxx
2. Direct document ID: e.g., JcKbdlokYoPIe0xDzJ1cduRXnRf

blockId.description: Block ID (required). The ID of the block to update.

text.description: Text content. Provide plain text without markdown syntax; use style object for formatting.

bold.description: Whether to make text bold. Default is false, equivalent to **text** in Markdown.

italic.description: Whether to make text italic. Default is false, equivalent to *text* in Markdown.

underline.description: Whether to add underline. Default is false.

strikethrough.description: Whether to add strikethrough. Default is false, equivalent to ~~text~~ in Markdown.

inline_code.description: Whether to format as inline code. Default is false, equivalent to `code` in Markdown.

style.description: Text style settings (optional). Omit entirely for unstyled text; only set properties that differ from the default (false).

anyOf.description: Regular text element with optional styling.

equation.description: Mathematical equation content. The formula or expression to display. Format: LaTeX.

anyOf.description: Mathematical equation element with optional styling.

textElements.description: Array of text content objects. A block can contain multiple text segments with different styles. Example: [{text:"Hello",style:{bold:true}},{text:" World",style:{italic:true}}]

items.description: A single block text update item: target blockId and its new text content.

updates.description: Array of block text update items (required, at least 1). Example: [{blockId:"xxx",textElements:[{text:"Hello",style:{bold:true}}]},{blockId:"yyy",textElements:[{text:"World"}]}]
